sentences.english: I visit my grandma's house every Sunday.
She always makes delicious food for me.
My favorite is her kimchi jjigae because it tastes different from the one my mom makes.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 건 할머니의 김치찌개인데 엄마가 만드는 것과 맛이 달라요.

sentences.english: After lunch we usually watch TV together on the sofa.
sentences.korean: 점심 후에 보통 소파에서 함께 TV를 봐요.

sentences.english: I always feel happy and warm when I'm at her house.
sentences.korean: 할머니 집에 있으면 항상 행복하고 따뜻해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
